languages.text: "Как я говорил — сама Погонщица прячется в переплетении корней. Вылезет только если побольше отростков порубить. Вот только... никто еще не убивал ее. Обычно она просто сбегает. Но у нас и оружия, подобного вашему, нет".

traits.locale_text: "Как я говорил — сама Погонщица прячется в переплетении корней. Вылезет только если побольше отростков порубить. Вот только... никто еще не убивал ее. Обычно она просто сбегает. Но у нас и оружия, подобного вашему, нет".

languages.text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."
languages.original_text: "Как я говорил — сама Погонщица прячется в переплетении корней. Вылезет только если побольше отростков порубить. Вот только... никто еще не убивал ее. Обычно она просто сбегает. Но у нас и оружия, подобного вашему, нет".

traits.locale_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. Only if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots will it come out. But here is the thing... no one has ever killed it. Usually it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

"As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

"As I said, the Drover itself hides deep below, in a tangle of roots. Only if you chop down its whole system of shoots will it come out. Otherwise, it will just grow new ones later. And here's the tricky part... no one has ever killed it. Usually it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

"As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. Only if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots will it come out. But here is the thing... no one has ever killed it. Usually it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

"As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

"As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

languages.text: 「言ったとおり、ドローバーは根の絡まりの中で深く隠れています。その根の絡まりを全部切らないと出てきません。そうでなければ、また新しい根を伸ばすだけですから。そして、難しいのは…誰もドローバーを殺したことがありません。普通は逃げていくだけですが、あなたのような武器はありませんから」
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides deep below, in a tangle of roots. Only if you chop down its whole system of shoots will it come out. Otherwise, it will just grow new ones later. And here's the tricky part... no one has ever killed it. Usually it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: 「言ったとおり、ドローバーは根の絡まりの中で深く隠れています。その根の絡まりを全部切らないと出てきません。そうでなければ、また新しい根を伸ばすだけですから。そして、難しいのは…誰もドローバーを殺したことがありません。普通は逃げていくだけですが、あなたのような武器はありませんから。」

languages.text: « Comme je vous l'ai dit, le Chasseur se cache dans un enchevêtrement de racines. Il n'en sortira que si vous taillez en pièces une bonne partie de ses drageons. Le hic... c'est que personne n'a jamais réussi à le tuer. Généralement, il finit par prendre la fuite. Mais nous n'avons pas d'armes comme les vôtres. »
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: « Comme je vous l'ai dit, le Chasseur se cache dans un enchevêtrement de racines. Il n'en sortira que si vous taillez en pièces une bonne partie de ses drageons. Le hic... c'est que personne n'a jamais réussi à le tuer. Généralement, il finit par prendre la fuite. Mais nous n'avons pas d'armes comme les vôtres. »

languages.text: "Dediğim gibi... Çoban'ın kendisi kök düğümleri arasında saklanıyor. Sadece filizlerinden büyük bir kısmı kesildiğinde dışarı çıkar. Asıl mesele şu ki... Onu şimdiye dek öldüren olmadı. Genellikle kaçıp gider. Gelgelelim bizde sizdeki silahlar yok."
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: "Dediğim gibi... Çoban'ın kendisi kök düğümleri arasında saklanıyor. Sadece filizlerinden büyük bir kısmı kesildiğinde dışarı çıkar. Asıl mesele şu ki... Onu şimdiye dek öldüren olmadı. Genellikle kaçıp gider. Gelgelelim bizde sizdeki silahlar yok."

languages.text: «Como he dicho, el Pastor se oculta entre un laberinto de raíces. Solo aparece si se talan un buen número de sus brotes. La cuestión es que nadie ha conseguido matarlo. Normalmente huye y ya está. Pero nosotros no tenemos armas como las suyas».
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: «Como he dicho, el Pastor se oculta entre un laberinto de raíces. Solo aparece si se talan un buen número de sus brotes. La cuestión es que nadie ha conseguido matarlo. Normalmente huye y ya está. Pero nosotros no tenemos armas como las suyas».

languages.text: “就像我说的，拒生花的本体藏在根系丛中。只有砍掉它的一大片芽条，它才会现身。可问题是……从来没人能杀死它。一般来说，它只会逃跑。不过，我们毕竟没有你们那样的武器。”
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: “就像我说的，拒生花的本体藏在根系丛中。只有砍掉它的一大片芽条，它才会现身。可问题是……从来没人能杀死它。一般来说，它只会逃跑。不过，我们毕竟没有你们那样的武器。”

languages.text: "Wie gesagt, der Treiber selbst versteckt sich in einem Geflecht aus Wurzeln. Er kommt nur heraus, wenn Ihr ihm seine Triebe abhackt. Es gibt da nur ein Problem ... bis jetzt konnte ihn niemand töten. Für gewöhnlich läuft er einfach weg. Allerdings haben wir nicht Eure Waffen."
languages.original_text: "As I said, the Drover itself hides in a tangle of roots. It will only come out if you chop down a whole bunch of its shoots. But here's the thing... no one's ever been able to kill it. Usually, it just runs away. But we don't have weapons like yours."

traits.locale_text: "Wie gesagt, der Treiber selbst versteckt sich in einem Geflecht aus Wurzeln. Er kommt nur heraus, wenn Ihr ihm seine Triebe abhackt. Es gibt da nur ein Problem ... bis jetzt konnte ihn niemand töten. Für gewöhnlich läuft er einfach weg. Allerdings haben wir nicht Eure Waffen."
